ten.

One (1) Two (2) Three (3) Four (4) Five (5) Six (6) Seven (7) Eight (8) Nine (9) Ten (10)

Did you enjoy counting together? It's always fun to learn new things!

By the way, did you know that in many cultures, numbers and math are seen as important for personal growth?

Keep practicing those counting skills - it'll be great for your future!
